title: Recover from waves that get stuck on "Loading"
summary: Opening a wave whose realtime channel never finished connecting could leave the wave panel stuck on the "Loading" spinner forever with no feedback. A watchdog now surfaces a one-tap Retry instead of hanging indefinitely.

items: Add a wave-open watchdog so a stalled realtime connection no longer leaves the wave panel stuck on "Loading" indefinitely.
Show a dismissible notification with a Retry action when a wave takes too long to open.
